critical.mandate: Every release must have a defined deployment strategy
Staged rollout percentages must be explicit

step.title: Release Scope
step.action: Define what's included: stories, features, bug fixes, breaking changes
Assign version number following semantic versioning
Identify release dependencies and ordering constraints

step.title: Deployment Strategy
step.action: Select strategy: blue-green, canary, rolling, or big-bang
Justify strategy choice based on risk profile and infrastructure
Define success criteria for each deployment phase

step.title: Staged Rollout
step.action: Define metrics to monitor at each stage
Specify abort criteria for each stage

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate release plan with: scope, deployment strategy, staged rollout schedule, communication plan, and success criteria.
